display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
新 RS leader 重建 ObDDLScheduler
扫描未完成 ddl_task 续推/重试 ob_ddl_retry_task

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ddl_epoch 提升
旧 master 的 DDL trans 因 epoch 比对失败被拒

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 数据补全 wait_data_complement 失败?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
任务标记失败
清理隐藏表/半成品索引 CLEANUP_GARBAGE_TASK

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
checksum/report 未齐
等待或返回 EAGAIN 重试

span.p:
MAKE_DDL_TAKE_EFFECT_TASK 一次性生效
drop column 走 REMAP_INDEXES_AND_TAKE_EFFECT_TASK
